name: Spam-Bolaya
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium shrimp, cooked and peeled
1 can Tomatoes (14 1/2 oz), chopped and peeled
1 Packet Rice-A-Roni (6.8 oz) Spanish Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube SPAM into 1/4 inch chunks and brown.
2. Boil the chicken breast in 3 cups of water until fully cooked.
3. Cook celery and bell pepper in the fat from the SPAM.
4. In a large pot, melt margarine and brown Rice-A-Roni. Add cooked celery and bell pepper.
5. Pour in stock from the cooked chicken and both cans of soup and tomatoes (undrained).
6. Add half of the seasoning mix packet from the Rice-A-Roni and stir.
7. Add bay leaves, Tabasco sauce, cayenne pepper, and Cajun seasoning.
8. Cook, covered, on low heat for 15 minutes.
9. Shred the chicken and add it back into the pot. Cook, covered, for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Add shrimp and uncover. Cook for another 5 minutes on medium heat.
11. Remove bay leaves before serving.
